summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete. Workflow references non-existent script (bin/secret-rotation-validator.sh) and fixture files (tests/fixtures/*.json), so all test steps will fail. Action `checkout@v4` (line 54) is NOT pinned to commit SHA, violating explicit best_practices requirement for "pinned action refs". No bats-core tests provided despite TDD requirement to "write failing test FIRST". Missing act-result.txt artifact. Fixture-based testing approach is sound theoretically, but unfeasible without implementation. Would not execute.
